title: gossampinus malabarica
intro: Gossampinus malabarica, also known as the Malabar kino tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The Malabar kino tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Gossampinus malabarica include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support digestive health and immune function. Herbal preparations of the Malabar kino tree include its bark, which can be processed into a powder or used to make a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes.
